Our Standards

The Atlantic
Difference

We did not build Atlantic Car Rental to be average. Every decision is made with one question in mind: would we accept this ourselves?

Plan Your Arrival
Island-Wide Delivery
We deliver anywhere in Aruba — airport, hotel, villa, or private address. Your vehicle is ready when you are.
Immaculate Condition
Every vehicle is fully detailed, inspected and sanitised before each rental. Without exception.
WhatsApp Concierge
Call or message any hour. You always reach a real person — never a bot, never a hold queue.
Island Expertise
Born in Aruba. We know every beach, route, hidden spot, and golden-hour viewpoint worth finding.
Zero Hidden Fees
Unlimited mileage always included. The price you see is the price you pay — no surprises at pickup.
Flexible Insurance
Choose your coverage. Basic, full collision, or zero-deductible — we will guide you to the right option for your trip.
Family Ready
Child seats, vans with extra luggage space. We anticipate every need before you ask.
5-Star Rated
Consistently 5 stars by our guests on Facebook. Built one experience at a time.

Explore Aruba

Know the Island
Before You Drive It

Aruba is 32 kilometres of volcanic cliffs, hidden coves, desert trails and world-class beaches that most visitors never see beyond their resort pool. We think that is a shame.

Start Your Adventure

Aruba has no hurricanes. 365 days of sun. Constant trade winds. And a raw interior that rewards those who venture beyond the beach strip.


Atlantic Car Rental exists for the traveler who drives into the desert at dawn, takes the Jeep to the Natural Pool before the tour groups arrive, and stops at a viewpoint because the view demanded it.


This is Aruba, elevated.

01
Eagle Beach
#3 Best Beach Caribbean. White sand, fofoti trees, turquoise water.
Any Vehicle
02
Natural Pool
Inside Arikok. Wild and dramatic. 4x4 access only.
Jeep Required
03
California Lighthouse
360° views of Aruba's wild north. Unmissable at golden hour.
All Vehicles
04
Baby Beach
Southern lagoon. Calm, shallow and crystal-clear. Perfect for families.
All Vehicles
05
Arikok National Park
Desert trails, cave paintings, Aruba's rawest landscapes.
SUV or Jeep

About Atlantic

Born in Aruba,
Built on Trust

Atlantic Car Rental was founded in 2020 on one conviction: the moment you land in Aruba, the adventure should begin — not the stress. We are based at the airport and we are the first friendly face after baggage claim.

We built our reputation on three things: vehicles in exceptional condition, pricing with no fine print, and service that feels personal. Small by design — because every guest deserves real attention.

Anywhere Delivery
Airport, hotel, villa — we come to you.
Immaculate Fleet
Detailed and inspected before every rental.
Always Reachable
Real people — call or WhatsApp anytime.
Island Experts
We know every road and shortcut in Aruba.
Part of OCC Holding & Consultancy Atlantic Car Rental is a proud member of OCC Holding & Consultancy — Connecting Oceans. A trusted Aruban group dedicated to excellence.
